activities_projects.title: Character Analysis of the Climbers
activities_projects.objective: Understand the traits and actions of the climbers
steps: Read the chapter carefully
Identify key climbers and their actions
List 5 traits for each climber with examples from the story
Discuss your analysis with a partner
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to analyse character behaviour
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of traits and examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Understanding the Journey
activities_projects.objective: Trace the climbers’ journey and challenges
steps: List the main events of the climb in order
Identify challenges faced and how they were overcome
Write a paragraph summarising the journey
Share your summary with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve comprehension and sequencing skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness and clarity of summary (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Theme Identification
activities_projects.objective: Recognize key themes in the story
steps: Discuss in pairs what the story teaches about perseverance, teamwork, and courage
Write a short paragraph explaining the theme
Share your ideas in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students identify and explain themes in literature
activities_projects.evaluation: Relevance and clarity of theme explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Descriptive Writing
steps: Choose a scene from the climb
Write 4–5 sentences describing what climbers saw, felt, and heard
Use descriptive words and expressions
Read your passage aloud in class
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and use of descriptive language (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Dialogue Writing
activities_projects.objective: Practice writing dialogues from the story
steps: Select a short conversation between climbers
Rewrite it as a dialogue including emotions and expressions
Read it aloud to classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop writing and communication skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and relevance of dialogue (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Building
steps: Find 10 new or challenging words in the chapter
Write their meanings
Use each word in a sentence
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meanings and sentence usage (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Travel Diary Entry
steps: Imagine you are one of the climbers
Write a diary entry about a day of the climb including experiences and feelings
Share your entry with a partner
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students practise narrative and reflective writing

activities_projects.title: Sentence Construction Practice
steps: Identify complex sentences in the chapter
Underline main and subordinate clauses
Write three new sentences about the climb using similar structures
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve grammar and sentence construction
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct sentence formation and clause identification (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Compare Journeys
steps: Discuss with a partner how the story’s climb is similar or different from a real-life journey you know
Write a short paragraph highlighting similarities and differences
Present your comparison to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical and comparative writing skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth and clarity of comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Creative Alternate Ending
steps: Think about how the climb could end differently
Write 4–5 sentences describing your alternate ending
Share your alternate ending with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop creativity and storytelling skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and creativity of ending (10 marks)
